children.description: First Contact Resolution Rate - percentage of customer service interactions resolved on the first call without callback or escalation. Rolling 12-month aggregate. Higher is better. Target: 85%+.
Average Customer Satisfaction Score - mean post-call survey rating (1-5 scale). Rolling 12-month aggregate. Higher is better. Target: 4.2+.
Average Handle Time - mean total call duration including hold time in seconds. Rolling 12-month aggregate. Lower is better. Target: <300 seconds.

elements.description: Unified customer profile combining account details, active contracts, equipment count, and lifetime billing value. Primary analytical surface for customer success and retention teams. One row per customer.

children.description: Surrogate key for the customer record
External-facing identifier used in all customer communications
Segmentation bucket: Residential | Commercial | MUR
Current lifecycle state of the account
City of the customer's primary service address
First 3 chars = FSA (Forward Sortation Area) used for geo-clustering

elements.description: Calendar date dimension used for daily, monthly, fiscal, and trend analysis.
Active equipment inventory enriched with age, warranty status, and service history. Supports proactive maintenance planning and field operations scheduling.

children.description: Surrogate key for the equipment record
Category: Water Heater | Furnace | Central AC | Heat Pump | Smart Thermostat
Manufacturer name
Manufacturer model number or name
Factory serial; used for warranty claims
Rental = Enercare owns; Customer-Owned = Enercare services only
Energy source: Natural Gas | Electric | Propane
Date equipment was installed at the service address
Decimal years since install_date
1 if warranty_expiry >= today; 0 if expired or NULL

elements.description: Product dimension for rental, protection, heating, cooling, and smart-home offerings.
Service account dimension representing service addresses, utility context, and lifecycle attributes.
Billing transactions used for revenue and payment-status analysis.
Calculates MRR contribution per contract for each calendar month. Supports Finance and Strategy reporting on revenue growth, churn, and product mix.

children.description: Unique contract identifier; join key to demo.contracts
Owning service account; join key to demo.service_accounts
MRR contribution of this contract in CAD
Contract state at query time
1 if this is the first billing month for this contract (acquisition)
1 if this contract was cancelled in this billing month

elements.description: All open and in-progress service requests enriched with SLA status, customer context, and equipment type. Primary operational dashboard for dispatch and service coordination.

children.description: Unique service request identifier
Work category: Installation | Emergency Repair | Maintenance | Inspection | Upgrade
Urgency tier: Low | Medium | High | Emergency
Current workflow state: Open | InProgress
Free-text description of the reported issue
Assigned technician; NULL if unassigned
1 if age_hours > sla_target_hours and request not yet completed
